texto: Because his [Damien Hirst] art is idea art - art drawn on the back of cigarette packets and beer mats, roughed out in airport departure lounges and the back of the taxis, usually delegated to and carried by others - this leaves Damien a lot of time for what might loosely be called socializing. Hanging around.
explicacao: Citação de Gordon Burn sobre passagem do tempo e prioridades. “Because his [Damien Hirst] art is idea art - art drawn on the back of cigarette packets and beer …” articula tempo, art, criticism em registro de tempo, com relevância para contextos como criticism e pop-culture.
